message:
feat(runtime): integrate native event listener into observation runtime

Wire NativeEventListener into ObservationRuntime with full lifecycle:
- NativeEventsConfig in config.rs with socket_path, enabled flag,
  hot-reload prohibition, tilde expansion, and validation
- PaneCursor::capture_delta() and emit_gap() in ingest.rs for direct
  content injection from native events (bypasses snapshot diffing)
- RuntimeConfig.native_event_socket plumbing through runtime.rs
- handle_native_event() dispatch: PaneOutput→capture_delta, StateChange
  →alt-screen gap detection, UserVarChanged→EventBus, PaneCreated→
  storage upsert + cursor/context init, PaneDestroyed→cleanup
- RuntimeHandle extended with optional native_events JoinHandle
- WEZTERM_WA_SOCKET env var override in main.rs
- native-wezterm feature propagated through wa crate Cargo.toml

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -45,6 +45,7 @@ mcp = ["wa-core/mcp", "dep:fastmcp"]
 web = ["wa-core/web"]
 tui = ["wa-core/tui"]
 metrics = ["wa-core/metrics"]
+native-wezterm = ["wa-core/native-wezterm"]
 distributed = ["wa-core/distributed"]
 sync = ["wa-core/sync"]
